TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sin‚Äôiy_go, title = Sin‚Äôiy_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sin‚Äôiy_go} }

S.FORM: Sin'iy go mki sku Nanto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,423.52 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,067.28 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 113.33 km¬≤), 12,373 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,695 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 9,393 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 76%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Sin'iy go ays psgayun 14 ru 17 alang. 17 alang hani ga, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan (malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan .

Sin'iy go mki sku Nanto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,423.52 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,067.28 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 113.33 km¬≤), 12,373 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,695 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 9,393 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 76%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Sin'iy go ays psgayun 14 ru 17 alang. 17 alang hani ga, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan (malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan .
S.PHON: s~…ēin Ēij …£o mki s~…ēku nanto keŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *,***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *,***.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km*), **,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na ő≤unun ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u s~…ēin Ēij …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, lanŇč*un , qapu ¶~ ®iu , tamazuan , is~…ēiŇčan , lai*azuan (mala*i) , naińßunpu , s~…ēalituŇč , s~…ēinapalan , ńßalus~…ēipun , luluna , qalipus~…ēuŇčan , mańßa*un (mamańßa*unna) , kaliő≤uan , tuŇčpu *ai…£az , ilaus~…ēan , *alana , ńßanő≤izan .
